TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-06-2010 IN DEPT. 220, PLAINTIFF RAMONA MORTENSEN AND MITCHELL MORTENSENS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING HELD. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TRIAL PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT CCP 36(D). TRIAL IS SET FOR 11:15 AM ON AUGUST 16, 2010, IN DEPARTMENT 206. 120TH DAY IS SEPTEMBER 3, 2010. PARTIES TO STIPULATE THAT THE LAST DAY FOR FILING OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY IS JULY 23, 2010 FOR A HEARING ON AUG. 4, 2010, OPPOSITIONS DUE BY JULY 29, 2010, REPLY DUE BY AUG. 2, 2010, ALL PAPERS SERVED BY E-SERVICE DO NOT ADD ANY ADDITIONAL DAYS. PLAINTIFF TO MAKE A DEMAND WITH AN EXPLANATION ON ALL DEFENDANTS NO LATER THAN 5 PM ON AUGUST 4. DEFENDANTS TO RESPOND WITH AN EXPLANATION NO LATER THAN AUGUST 9. MSC IN ROOM 603 AT 9AM ON AUGUST 10. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT BY 30 DAYS AFTER THE GRANTING OF PREFERENCE. ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL RELY ON PROPOSITION 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 50 DAYS AFTER THE GRANTING OF PREFERENCE. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE EXCHANGED 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. PLAINTIFF'S ECONOMIC REPORT (TO THE EXTENT IT EXISTS) SHALL BE SERVED 30 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: E. BURA/SAJJA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (220)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 31248401) AS TO DEFENDANT PNEUMO ABEX LLC, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO ABEX CORPORATION
